input.target_audience: CTOs and VPs of Engineering at Series B+ SaaS companies with active hiring
input.key_message: Cut new engineer time-to-first-commit from 2 weeks to 3 days, automatically
customer_outcomes: Carta reduced new engineer time-to-productivity by 65%
Plaid onboards 20 engineers/month with zero dedicated DevEx headcount

meta_variants.primary_text: Your new engineers spend their first 2 weeks reading stale wikis and waiting for access. By the time they're productive, you've wasted $15k+ in loaded cost and they've already formed opinions about your culture. DevOnboard cuts that to 3 days.
meta_variants.headline: First commit in 3 days

meta_variants.primary_text: Carta onboards engineers 65% faster with DevOnboard. Plaid runs 20 new hires a month with zero dedicated DevEx headcount. If you're hiring 3+ engineers per quarter, the math changes fast.
meta_variants.headline: Carta onboards 65% faster

meta_variants.primary_text: The teams with the best engineering culture aren't spending more time on onboarding — they're spending less. Here's why: they automated the part that doesn't require a human, so humans can focus on the part that does.
meta_variants.headline: Less onboarding. Better culture.
meta_variants.description: How the best teams do it

meta_variants.primary_text: Connect GitHub, Jira, and Confluence. DevOnboard builds a personalized 3-day onboarding path for every new engineer automatically — environment setup, codebase orientation, first ticket, and team context. Done.
meta_variants.headline: Automate engineer onboarding

google_variants.description_1: DevOnboard automates engineer onboarding end-to-end. Connect GitHub, Jira, Confluence — the system builds itself in one afternoon.
google_variants.description_2: Carta cut time-to-productivity by 65%. Plaid runs 20 hires/month with zero DevEx headcount. See how.

output.recommended_meta: Lead with the pain variant for cold audiences — the '$15k wasted cost' framing will resonate with CTOs who think in loaded cost terms. Switch to social proof (Carta) for retargeting.
output.recommended_google: Run with keyword insertion in headline_1 for Quality Score optimization. The '3 days' specific claim in headline_2 is your differentiator — don't generalize it.

ab_test_pairings.hypothesis: Financial framing (pain) will outperform with CTOs who own budget; operational framing (direct value) will outperform with VPs Eng who own process. Segment by title if possible.
